title: Fix naive_datetime timestamps to UTC
prompt: The LogEntry schema in test_fixtures/naive_datetime_timestamps.ex uses the default `timestamps()` which maps to naive_datetime. The app serves users globally across time zones, so inserted_at and updated_at should be stored in UTC. Update the timestamps() macro to use `type: :utc_datetime`. Write the fixed schema to lib/my_app/logging/log_entry.ex.
tier_rationale: Single-macro change. Easy but high-value because the default is globally wrong — the Ecto maintainer has publicly acknowledged this is a historical accident.
research_citation: Ecto Issue #2683 — Wojtek Mach: 'I personally agree these would be the better defaults.'
